services.name: Worklog Submission
services.goal: Record billable hours by project for payroll and client invoicing.
services.desc: Submit your weekly hours against projects and tasks in the Time Tracking Portal. Worklogs feed directly into your PTR and client invoices. Jira tasks are auto-synced. Just verify and adjust if needed. Google Calendar events can be imported as draft entries.

actions.name: Submit Worklog
actions.desc: Open worklog form in Time Tracking Portal

actions.name: View My Worklogs
actions.desc: Browse history of submitted entries

actions.name: Jira Sync Settings
actions.desc: Configure automatic Jira task import

actions.name: Export Report
actions.desc: Download worklog data as CSV

ecosystem.name: PTR Report
ecosystem.ctx: Hours aggregate into your monthly Project Time Report

ecosystem.name: Client Invoice
ecosystem.ctx: Approved PTR auto-generates the client invoice

ecosystem.name: Manager Dashboard
ecosystem.ctx: Team utilization visible to your line manager

ecosystem.name: Google Calendar
ecosystem.ctx: Calendar events can be imported as worklog draft entries

services.name: Project Time Report (PTR)
services.goal: Aggregate monthly time data and submit for manager approval before invoicing.
services.desc: At month end, your worklogs are compiled into a PTR. Review, adjust if needed, and submit for your line manager's approval. Once approved, invoice generation triggers automatically.
preconditions: All worklogs submitted for the reporting period
Reporting period is open (1stâ5th of month)

actions.name: Submit PTR
actions.desc: Submit your monthly consolidated time report

actions.name: Track Approval Status
actions.desc: See where your PTR is in the approval chain

actions.name: View PTR History
actions.desc: Browse past PTRs and their statuses

ecosystem.name: Invoice Generation
ecosystem.ctx: PTR approval triggers automatic invoice creation

ecosystem.name: Finance Reports
ecosystem.ctx: PTR data feeds into company-wide finance reporting

ecosystem.name: AR Team Queue
ecosystem.ctx: Approved PTR enters accounts receivable workflow

services.name: Invoice Generation
services.goal: Generate and submit client invoices automatically from approved PTR data.
services.desc: Once your PTR is approved, the Finance Module generates a draft invoice with amounts pre-filled from your time data. Review project details and client information, then submit for AR processing.

actions.name: Generate Invoice
actions.desc: Create invoice draft from approved PTR

actions.name: View Invoice History
actions.desc: Browse past invoices and payment statuses

actions.name: Submit for AR Review
actions.desc: Forward completed invoice to AR team queue

actions.name: Contact AR Team
actions.desc: Get help from the AR team directly

ecosystem.ctx: Invoice enters the accounts receivable tracking queue

ecosystem.name: Client Records
ecosystem.ctx: Invoice linked to client contract history

ecosystem.name: Billing Report
ecosystem.ctx: Revenue data reflected in monthly billing report

services.desc: Participate in the quarterly performance cycle: submit your self-assessment, provide peer feedback for colleagues, and receive consolidated scores from your manager and HR BP.

actions.name: Submit Peer Feedback

services.name: Appreciation Bonus
services.goal: Nominate colleagues or receive recognition bonuses for outstanding contributions.
services.desc: Submit a bonus nomination for a colleague who made exceptional impact. Nomination goes through manager approval, Finance verifies budget, then HR processes payment in the next payroll cycle.
preconditions: Bonus budget approved for current quarter

actions.desc: Nominate a colleague for appreciation bonus

actions.desc: Check status of nominations you submitted

services.name: IT Support
services.goal: Request hardware, software access, or technical troubleshooting from the IT team.
services.desc: Submit an IT support ticket for hardware issues, new software access requests, or technical problems. The Operations Portal routes your request to the correct IT specialist based on type and priority.

services.name: Agreement Termination
services.goal: Initiate the offboarding process to formally terminate a contractor agreement.
services.desc: Submit a termination request to begin formal offboarding. Triggers a cascade across HR, Finance, IT, and Time Tracking: final PTR and invoice created, IT assets flagged for return, portal access revoked.

actions.name: Submit Termination Request
actions.desc: Fill the termination request form to start offboarding

actions.name: Check Offboarding Status
actions.desc: Track cascade progress across all systems

actions.name: Contact HR
actions.desc: Speak with HR BP about termination details

ecosystem.name: HR Portal
ecosystem.ctx: Contractor status updated to Terminated, access revoked

ecosystem.name: Time Tracking
ecosystem.ctx: Access locked; final PTR auto-triggered for review

ecosystem.name: Finance
ecosystem.ctx: Final invoice and outstanding accruals processed

ecosystem.name: IT Assets
ecosystem.ctx: Equipment return workflow initiated with IT team

processes.name: Month-End Time Reporting
processes.goal: Close the monthly time reporting cycle and trigger client invoicing.
processes.desc: Complete your monthly time reporting cycle from worklog submission through PTR approval to invoice generation.
processes.scope: From worklog submission through PTR approval to invoice generation. Excludes payroll processing and client payment tracking.
processes.triggerCondition: Reporting period opens on the 1st of each month. Deadline: 5th of month.
processes.outputs: Approved PTR and generated client invoice submitted to AR team.

steps.name: Submit Worklogs
steps.successOutput: All billable hours recorded in Time Tracking Portal
steps.failureOutput: Incomplete worklogs block PTR submission

steps.name: Submit PTR
steps.triggerInput: All worklogs submitted for the period
steps.successOutput: PTR sent to line manager for review
steps.failureOutput: PTR cannot be submitted with missing worklogs

steps.name: Approve PTR
steps.human: Review and approve in portal or via email notification
steps.successOutput: PTR approved â invoice generation triggered automatically
steps.failureOutput: PTR returned with comments for correction

steps.name: Generate Invoice
steps.successOutput: Draft invoice sent to AR team queue
steps.failureOutput: Invoice generation fails if PTR data is incomplete

processes.name: Performace Review
processes.goal: Run a structured performance review for a contractor — from quarterly planning through ceremony and outcome
processes.desc: Full 360° performance cycle: self-assessment, peer feedback, manager scoring, HR calibration, and results.
processes.scope: From contractor appearing in quarterly PR plan through budget alignment, monthly scheduling, configuration, ceremony setup to finalization. Excludes legal contract changes.
processes.triggerCondition: Contractor's planned PR date triggers automatic inclusion in quarterly planning tasks
processes.outputs: One of: PDP / Performance Improvement Plan created; compensation change decision made; health check recorded

steps.name: Quarterly PR Planning
steps.human: Review the contractor list for the upcoming quarter. For each contractor: specify expectations and select the planned review type
steps.triggerInput: Contractor's planned PR date falls within the upcoming quarter
steps.successOutput: Quarterly contractor list with expectations and review types submitted
steps.failureOutput: Missing contractor data — planning incomplete, HR notified

steps.name: Budget Owner Review
steps.human: Review the planned PR list and contractor expectations. Confirm budget scope and approve which reviews will proceed this quarter
steps.successOutput: Budget scope confirmed, reviews approved to proceed
steps.failureOutput: Budget not confirmed — reviews deferred, manager notified

steps.name: Monthly PR Planning
steps.human: Update contractor list for the upcoming month. Confirm expectations and decisions, schedule specific PR dates, initiate reviews
steps.triggerInput: Budget scope confirmed by Budget Owner
steps.successOutput: Monthly PR dates scheduled, contractors added to review pipeline
steps.failureOutput: Schedule conflicts — dates renegotiated with HR

steps.name: PR Initialization
steps.human: Set contractor's assessment level. Confirm and lock the PR date
steps.successOutput: Assessment level set, PR date locked
steps.failureOutput: Date conflict — rescheduled with HR

steps.name: Customer Feedback Setup
steps.human: If customer feedback needed: create outbound emails — system inserts feedback form links. Manager sends emails. Customer responses flow into contractor's PR form automatically
steps.successOutput: Customer feedback forms sent; responses collected into PR form
steps.failureOutput: No customer response — proceed without or reschedule

steps.name: Internal Feedback Setup
steps.human: If internal feedback needed: select colleagues — system sends feedback forms to selected reviewers. Responses collected back into system automatically
steps.successOutput: Colleague feedback forms sent and responses collected
steps.failureOutput: Insufficient responses — manager decides to proceed or wait

steps.name: Technical Assessment
steps.human: If technical assessment needed: manager assigns a tech expert or requests one. Tech expert receives task, conducts assessment, and fills evaluation form in system
steps.successOutput: Technical evaluation form completed and submitted
steps.failureOutput: No tech expert available — HR notified to find alternative

steps.name: PR Ceremony Setup
steps.human: Create calendar appointment. Find available slot across all participants. Set up meeting in calendar
steps.triggerInput: All configuration steps done, PR date confirmed
steps.successOutput: PR ceremony scheduled in all participants' calendars
steps.failureOutput: No slot found — date adjusted with manager

steps.name: PR Finalization
steps.human: After ceremony: enter contractor feedback, select output type and finalize process
steps.successOutput: Process finalized: PDP created / compensation change initiated / health check recorded
steps.failureOutput: Incomplete feedback — HR follows up with participants

processes.name: Contractor Onboarding
processes.goal: Get a new contractor fully operational â access, equipment, and first worklog â within their first week.
processes.desc: Everything needed to get a new contractor fully operational â from signed agreement to first worklog.
processes.scope: From signed contractor agreement through equipment provisioning and portal setup to first submitted worklog. Excludes legal contract negotiation.
processes.triggerCondition: Contractor agreement signed and confirmed in legal system by HR BP.
processes.outputs: Contractor is active: has equipment, all portal access granted, company policies understood, first worklog submitted.

steps.name: Agreement Signed
steps.human: Contractor agreement finalized and signed in legal system
steps.successOutput: Signed agreement recorded in legal system
steps.failureOutput: Onboarding paused until agreement is signed

steps.name: Set Up Time Tracking
steps.successOutput: Contractor has Time Tracking Portal access and first project assigned
steps.failureOutput: Access issue â Finance team contacted

steps.name: Provision Equipment
steps.successOutput: Laptop and required software delivered
steps.failureOutput: Equipment delay â IT team provides loaner or remote setup

steps.name: HR Intro Meeting
steps.human: 30-min intro call: benefits, policies, key contacts
steps.successOutput: Contractor understands company policies and key contacts
steps.failureOutput: Meeting rescheduled â policies shared via email

steps.name: Submit First Worklog
steps.successOutput: Contractor is fully operational
steps.failureOutput: Worklog issues â Finance team contacted

processes.name: Agreement Termination
processes.goal: Formally terminate a contractor agreement and complete all offboarding steps across HR, Finance, and IT.
processes.desc: Submit a termination request to begin formal offboarding. Triggers a cascade across HR, Finance, IT, and Time Tracking.
processes.scope: From termination request submission to automated notifications and offboarding cascade. Excludes legal archiving of contract documents.
processes.triggerCondition: Manager or HR BP submits Agreement Termination request form in Operations Portal.
processes.outputs: Contractor access revoked, final PTR and invoice triggered, IT equipment return initiated, all stakeholders notified.

steps.name: Submit Termination Request
steps.successOutput: Termination request saved and sent to backend
steps.failureOutput: Form incomplete â requester contacted by portal admin

steps.name: Send Notification Email
steps.successOutput: Email notification sent to all stakeholders (HR, Finance, IT, managers)
steps.failureOutput: Request status set to Failed â visible on History page

steps.name: Revoke Portal Access
steps.human: Deactivate contractor account in HR Portal and all connected systems
steps.successOutput: All portal access revoked
steps.failureOutput: Access issue escalated to IT

steps.name: Trigger Final PTR & Invoice
steps.successOutput: Final PTR auto-created; invoice generated after approval
steps.failureOutput: Missing worklogs â Finance team contacts manager

steps.name: Initiate Equipment Return
steps.successOutput: Equipment return ticket created and assigned
steps.failureOutput: Equipment location unknown â IT contacts manager

steps.name: Review & Confirm Completion
steps.human: Check all offboarding steps completed; mark process as closed
steps.successOutput: Offboarding complete â contractor record archived
steps.failureOutput: Outstanding items tracked until resolved
